Upland Software faces notable cybersecurity risk as it depends heavily on internal and third‑party IT systems to manage operations and process sensitive customer data. A successful attack or system failure, including ransomware, phishing, or exploitation of software vulnerabilities, could trigger operational disruption, data loss, and severe reputational harm.
